name: Jam and Oatmeal Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 9-inch square pan.
3. In a large bowl, combine the oatmeal, walnuts, melted butter, flour, brown sugar, salt, and baking soda until well mixed. Set aside 1 cup of this mixture.
4. Pour the remaining oatmeal mixture into the greased pan.
5. Spread the raspberry jam evenly over the top of the oatmeal layer.
6. Sprinkle the reserved oatmeal mixture over the jam.
7. Bake for 10 minutes, then bake for an additional 20 minutes or until the top is golden brown.
8. Allow to cool before cutting into bars.
